tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: BBC and ITV will stream 2026 World Cup matches on YouTube for FREE! 🇬🇧 Fans in England can catch all the action live from the USA, Mexico, and Canada! #WorldCup2026 #FootballOnYouTube
article_title: BBC and ITV given green light to show World Cup games on YouTube in landmark deal

article_title: Türkiye win to close in on 1st World Cup since '02

tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Turkey defeats Romania 1-0 in the World Cup playoff semi-final! Ferdi Kadioglu scores, assisted by Arda Guler's brilliant pass. Turkey is one step closer to ending their World Cup drought! 🇹🇷⚽️ #WorldCup #TurkeyFootball
article_title: World Cup playoffs: Arda Guler magic helps Turkey edge past Romania
